description_long: This is a hardcover book with a green cover and a black-and-white photographic portrait of a man on the front. The book's cover is mostly green, with the upper portion featuring the photograph and the lower portion solid green. The spine is also green, with bold white vertical text displaying the author's name and the book's title. The back cover is plain green with no visible text or imagery. The book appears to be of standard thickness, with visible pages inside, and the cover has a slightly matte finish with some subtle surface texture.
description: A green hardcover book featuring a black-and-white portrait on the front and bold white text on the spine. The back cover is plain green with no visible markings.
description_view_0: The spine of the book is visible, showing bold white vertical text on a green background.
description_view_1: The front cover displays a black-and-white portrait of a man on the upper half, with a green background and white text above.
description_view_2: The top edge of the book is visible, showing the white pages and green cover edges.
description_view_3: The back cover is plain green with no visible text or imagery.
attribute_cover_illustration: A grayscale photographic portrait of a man in profile, with a neutral background. The image is simple and documentary in style, focusing on the subject's face and upper shoulders.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is green with bold white vertical text running from top to bottom, displaying the author's name and the book's title. There are no decorative patterns or additional elements.
